title: Britain’s Electorate Is ‘Splintering.’ Can Its System Stand the Strain?
summary_full: Insurgent parties like Reform U.K. surged at the polls this week. But the British electoral system wasn’t built for multiparty democracy.
summary_public: Insurgent parties like Reform U.K. surged at the polls this week. But the British electoral system wasn’t built for multiparty democracy.

GB.label: neutral
